## What & why

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New rule / provider / reporter
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🧪 Tests / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes and new behaviour is covered by a test
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
